issue: haus.phpunit-patterns appears in implementation-task context even though the task is not test-related.
expected: Testing-tagged rules should only appear when the task references testing, fixtures, coverage, or assertions.
rootCauseHypothesis: phpunit-patterns has `repoRoles: ["laravel-app"]` and a Laravel-flavored title that the keyword filter does not exclude; the testing-vs-implementation distinction is not encoded.
resolvedByTest: tests/cross-bleed.test.js (laravel-app / add queue job rejects testing rules)
